nasb.text: On the seventh day the priest shall look at the infection, and if the scale has not spread and no yellowish hair has grown in it, and the appearance of the scale is no deeper than the skin,

esv.text: and on the seventh day the priest shall examine the disease. If the itch has not spread, and there is in it no yellow hair, and the itch appears to be no deeper than the skin,

cnv.text: 到了第七天，祭司要察看患處；如果看見癩痢沒有蔓延，那裡也沒有黃毛，癩痢也沒有深透皮膚的現象，

ccb.text: 第七天，祭司要检查患处，若发现疥癣没有扩散，上面没有黄毛，患处没有凹陷，
